block_deployment.title: Phase 5 run.results reassignment destroys traceability data
block_deployment.description: run.results = {...} at line 1458 is a full reassignment that destroys run.results.traceability set at line 1325. Feature is non-functional in production.
block_deployment.fix: Change to run.results = { ...run.results, leader: ..., implementation: ..., ... } to preserve traceability data.

this_sprint.title: Missing Plans/ directory causes non-JSON stdout from enforcer
this_sprint.fix: Output JSON on all error paths when --json flag is set

this_sprint.title: No timeout on traceability enforcer execution
this_sprint.fix: Add timeout option to execInWorker call (e.g., 60000ms)

this_sprint.title: FR-XXX regex matches prose text as real requirement IDs
this_sprint.fix: Tighten regex with word boundaries or stricter pattern

this_sprint.title: No unit tests for Phase 3.4 traceability capture logic
this_sprint.fix: Add tests for executeWorkflow Phase 3.4 covering JSON parse, empty output, exec failure

this_sprint.title: No node_modules/dist/build exclusion in file walker
this_sprint.fix: Add SKIP_DIRS set and filter dirs[:] in os.walk loop

next_sprint.title: Heredoc delimiter collision allows PR body shell injection
next_sprint.note: Pre-existing issue, not introduced by this change

next_sprint.title: Shell injection via prTitle backticks/$
next_sprint.note: Pre-existing issue, not introduced by this change

next_sprint.title: console.log instead of structured logging
next_sprint.note: Pre-existing pattern across entire file (~60 call sites)

next_sprint.title: Python3/script missing yields misleading 'no output' reason
next_sprint.fix: Check exitCode before stdout; include exit code in reason
